Amended Notice And Motion To Compel Baker & Mckenzie Llp'S Compliance With Deposition Subpoena
Off Calendar Apr-22-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jordan A. Lavinsky, Esq., appearing for plaintiff/moving party
E. Forrest Shryock, Jr., Esq., appearing for defendant Frette, Inc. & Frette CA
Allison S. Y. Chang, Esq., appearing for 3rd party witness Baker & McKenzie
Ruling:
Argued and tentation ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion to compel compliance with deposition subpoena is denied. The service of the deposition subpoena did not comply with CCP Sections 2020 (f) and 2020 (d)(1). In addition, the subpoena seeks communications protected by the attorney - client privilege. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
